case_title: NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-2, VS. SELENA LENGSAVATH ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT LENGSAVATH, SELENA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-2, A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LENGSAVATH, SELENA $10,989.11 PRINCIPAL, $494.35 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $11,483.46, SEE SCANNED DOC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $494.35 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100076594) AS TO DEFENDANT LENGSAVATH, SELENA
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-23-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-23-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100076594) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 15
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COST CCP 1033 (TRANSACTION ID # 100076594) FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-2, A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S)

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS (TRANSACTION ID # 78782531) FILED BY ATTORNEY BOULANGER, MICHAEL R

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF NATIONAL COLLEGIATE STUDENT LOAN TRUST 2007-2, A DELAWARE STATUTORY TRUST(S) AS TO DEFENDANT LENGSAVATH, SELENA DOES 1 TO 15 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-05-2018
